name: platty-mcp
description: Platty MCP retrieval, impact, memory, and SDD handoff skills for configured remote context servers.

interface.shortDescription: Platty MCP retrieval, impact, memory, and SDD handoffs
interface.longDescription: Use Platty MCP skills for read-only retrieval and impact analysis against configured remote Platty context, memory lifecycle requests, and local SDD handoffs that write prd.md, user_stories.md, and system_design.md before generating approval-gated tasks.md, without running local CLI lifecycle commands.
defaultPrompt: Search my configured Platty MCP context.
Draft prd.md and user_stories.md in Korean.
After I approve system_design.md, generate tasks.md.
